name: Downtown Office Tower

location.address: 123 Main Street, Financial District, New York, NY 10001

short_description: Prime Grade A office tower in the heart of the financial district. 50 stories with modern amenities and stunning city views.
long_description: This iconic 50-story office tower stands as a beacon in New York's bustling Financial District. Completed in 2010, it boasts state-of-the-art infrastructure, LEED Gold certification, and panoramic views of Manhattan and the Hudson River. The property offers flexible floor plates, high-speed elevators, and a grand lobby designed by a renowned architect. Ideal for major corporations seeking a prestigious address. Amenities include a tenant-only fitness center, multiple conference facilities, a rooftop terrace, and direct access to public transportation.

name: High Street Retail Unit
short_description: Excellent retail opportunity on a bustling high street with heavy foot traffic. Ideal for fashion, F&B, or services.
long_description: Premium retail unit located on one of London's most prestigious shopping streets. The unit features double-height ceilings, floor-to-ceiling windows, and over 30 metres of street frontage. Strong covenant in place with a blue-chip tenant, providing immediate rental income. Excellent transport connectivity via underground and bus routes.

name: Logistics Hub Warehouse

location.address: Plot 42, Jebel Ali Free Zone, Dubai

short_description: Modern warehouse facility with excellent connectivity to major highways and ports. High ceilings and multiple loading docks.
long_description: State-of-the-art logistics facility located in Jebel Ali Free Zone, the premier industrial hub of the Middle East. The property features 15-metre clear ceiling heights, 24 dock-high loading bays, ESFR sprinkler system, and ample yard space for trailer parking. Perfect for e-commerce, third-party logistics, or distribution operations.

name: Boutique Hotel Investment
short_description: Charming boutique hotel in a prime tourist location. Recently renovated with high occupancy rates and strong financials.
long_description: Elegant 80-room boutique hotel housed in a 19th-century Haussmann-style building, just steps from the Louvre. Fully renovated in 2021, the property includes a Michelin-recommended restaurant, rooftop bar, spa, and conference facilities. Year-round occupancy averages 85% with strong ADR performance.

name: Tech Park Mixed-Use
short_description: Modern tech-park campus with R&D labs, flex office space, and amenities. Tenanted by leading tech firms.
long_description: Award-winning sustainable mixed-use development in Singapore's premier technology corridor. Features wet/dry labs, raised-floor flex office space, food halls, childcare, and direct MRT access. Anchor tenants include global cloud and biotech leaders on long-term leases.

name: Industrial Land Parcel
short_description: Development-ready industrial land parcel with all permits in place. Excellent autobahn and rail access.
long_description: Shovel-ready 5-hectare industrial land parcel in Frankfurt's eastern logistics belt. All zoning, environmental, and building permits secured. Direct rail siding access and 2 km from A661 autobahn. Ideal for last-mile distribution or light manufacturing.
